meta.description: Watermark + action tracker for upstream PAI repo monitoring. Tracks data freshness (lastSeenAt, lastCommentCount) AND decision state (disposition) per item.

dispositionValues.new: First seen in latest scan, not yet presented to user
dispositionValues.open: Presented in scan report, awaiting user's decision
dispositionValues.ignore: Explicitly decided: not relevant or not worth acting on
dispositionValues.implemented: Acted on — see action field for what was done
dispositionValues.deferred: Relevant but not acting now — will re-surface if new comments appear

filteringRules.resurfaceIf: disposition is 'new' or 'open', OR comments > lastCommentCount (regardless of disposition)
filteringRules.skipIf: disposition is 'ignore' or 'implemented' AND comments == lastCommentCount
